_comment: AbsenceApp V2 Design System — menu.json — Phase 2
_description: Navigation menu structure. Loaded by SidebarV2 in Phase 3. Mirrors NavigationMetadataService but in JSON form for config-driven rendering.
_changes: 2.1.0 — 2026-03-24 — Corrected all href routes to include /v2 prefix to match actual Blazor routing. Fixes Page Not Found errors.
